reason: Fix AgentBuddy static checks for routing-ops-notifications and tracking-ops-resolution: allowed frontmatter keys, YAML list allowed-tools, when-to-use descriptions, TOC for long references, and no extra root entries.

skills.command: NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=http://bnpm.byted.org npx -y agentbuddy@latest skill publish ./human_review_ops/skills/notification --group skills.byted.org/lizhongtao/hunman_review_ops --access restricted --region cn -y
skills.verification_command: NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=http://bnpm.byted.org npx -y agentbuddy@latest skill find notifications
skills.note: Exact query `routing-ops-notifications` returned 0 due to search behavior, while `notifications` returned the published internal skill.

skills.command: NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=http://bnpm.byted.org npx -y agentbuddy@latest skill publish ./human_review_ops/skills/resolution --group skills.byted.org/lizhongtao/hunman_review_ops --access restricted --region cn -y
skills.verification_command: NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=http://bnpm.byted.org npx -y agentbuddy@latest skill find tracking-ops-resolution
